suggestedPatch.target: Oahu isn’t that big, but two-hour traffic jams and reservation-only activities (like Hanauma Bay) punish indecision.
suggestedPatch.before: Oahu isn’t that big, but two-hour traffic jams and reservation-only activities (like Hanauma Bay) punish indecision.

suggestedPatch.before: Coordinating a 7-day Oahu group trip is chaos until you get specific.
